name: tanhdev.com
description: Technical blog by Lê Tuấn Anh — Go backend architecture, microservices, distributed systems, AI engineering, and Magento platform migration. 17+ years production experience. Real case studies from Lotte Innovate Vietnam (25M+ req/month, 8K RPS).
